'''zakava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamarro|zamarro]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamarro|zamarro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækævæth|zækævæth]] || [[word:zækævæj|zækævæj]] || [[word:zækævæsh|zækævæsh]] || [[word:zækævæ|zækævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakavath|zakakavath]] || [[word:zakakavaj|zakakavaj]] || [[word:zakakavash|zakakavash]] || [[word:zakakava|zakakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakavath|zakavath]] || [[word:zakavaj|zakavaj]] || [[word:zakavash|zakavash]] || [[word:zakava|zakava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakafvath|zakafvath]] || [[word:zakafvaj|zakafvaj]] || [[word:zakafvash|zakafvash]] || [[word:zakafvaf|zakafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakavatha|zakavatha]] || [[word:zakavaja|zakavaja]] || [[word:zakavasha|zakavasha]] || [[word:zakavaka|zakavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakavath|zakavath]] || [[word:zakavaj|zakavaj]] || [[word:zakavash|zakavash]] || [[word:zakava|zakava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakavathal|zakavathal]] || [[word:zakavajal|zakavajal]] || [[word:zakavashal|zakavashal]] || [[word:zakavakal|zakavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakavathatha|zakavathatha]] || [[word:zakavajaja|zakavajaja]] || [[word:zakavashasha|zakavashasha]] || [[word:zakavaka|zakavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakavathan|zakavathan]] || [[word:zakavajan|zakavajan]] || [[word:zakavashan|zakavashan]] || [[word:zakavakan|zakavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakavathaoro|zakavathaoro]] || [[word:zakavajaoro|zakavajaoro]] || [[word:zakavashaoro|zakavashaoro]] || [[word:zakavakaoro|zakavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
